one_time_description: Gain on disposal of tangible capital assets
economic_notes: Nation operates KFN Market Husky, Kawacatoose Enterprises, and Kawacatoose General Store Limited Partnership. Member of Touchwood Agency Tribal Council Inc. and Touchwood Child & Family Services Inc. Has real estate partnership with Indigena KFN Real Estate ULC. Involved in Touchwood Agency Specific Claim related to alleged mismanagement of funds 1920-1924.
notes: Consolidated entity includes 6 subsidiaries: Kawacatoose First Nation CMHC Housing, Kawacatoose Business Development Corporation, Asiniw Resources Ltd., 101159591 Saskatchewan Ltd. (KFN Market Husky), Kawacatoose Enterprises (590376 Saskatchewan Ltd.), and Kawacatoose General Store Limited Partnership. Kawacatoose Treaty Land Entitlement Trust and Kawacatoose Specific Claim Trust excluded as Chief and Council do not control them. Nation adopted PS 3400 Revenue standard prospectively effective April 1, 2023. Large increase in accounts receivable from $1M to $4.2M driven mainly by ISC receivable. Significant contingent liability related to Touchwood Agency Specific Claim (potential share of ~$2.25M interest-free loan). Total government transfers estimated as ISC ($20,801,946) plus CMHC ($390,855) plus Heritage Canada ($471,089) minus deferred revenue adjustments already included in ISC line; osr calculated as total revenue minus ISC total line of $20,801,946 minus CMHC $390,855 minus Heritage Canada $471,089 = $10,963,707. Province is Saskatchewan (Treaty 4 Territory, Saskatoon auditor address).
